summary: GetYourGuide exposes two authenticated HTTP surfaces: a supplier-facing API at https://{host}/1 with OpenAPI spec https://integrator.getyourguide.com/assets/api_documentation/supplier-api-supplier-endpoints.yaml, and a GetYourGuide-hosted API at https://supplier-api.getyourguide.com/1 with OpenAPI spec https://integrator.getyourguide.com/assets/api_documentation/supplier-api-gyg-endpoints.yaml; both use Basic Auth.
